title: StepStone Group Inc. (STEP) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript | Seeking Alpha
relevant_snippets: StepStone Group Inc. ( STEP ) Q4 2025 Results Conference Call May 22, 2025 5:00 PM ET

Thank you for standing by, and welcome to the StepStone Group's Fiscal Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call. At this time, all participants are in listen-only mode. After the speakers' presentation, there will be a question-and-answer session. [Operator Instructions] As a reminder, today's program is being recorded.
